notes.note: Written from Brundisium in November 48 BC, soon after Cicero's return from the Pompeian camp following the defeat at Pharsalus; the anxiety pervading the letter reflects his uncertainty over Caesar's likely treatment of him.

notes.anchor: the day before the Nones of November
notes.note: The Nones of November fell on the 5th, so this is 4 November; the dispatch note 'from Brundisium' records the port where Cicero was confined awaiting Caesar's return from the East.
